next_steps: Initiate broad-spectrum IV antibiotics (e.g., ceftriaxone and vancomycin) pending cultures
Perform echocardiogram to evaluate for coronary artery abnormalities
Obtain inflammatory markers (ESR, CRP) and complete blood count with differential
Obtain serum albumin, liver function tests, and urinalysis
Consult pediatric infectious disease and cardiology specialists
Consider intravenous immunoglobulin (IVIG) therapy if Kawasaki disease is highly suspected
